Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 1}Occasionally, a newly created Persona will come {f 0 1 2}bearing an item{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 1}This item can be obtained by raising the item-bearing Persona to a predetermined level.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 1}You can check the attainable item under Persona status on the Skills Details screen.[n]{f 1 1}
